hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
patterns = [
    r'DROP\s+TABLE',
    r'DROP\s+DATABASE',
    r'DELETE\s+FROM\s+\w+\s*(?!WHERE)',
    r'DELETE\s+FROM\s+\w+\s*;',
    r'(rm|del)\s+.*data\.db',
]
for p in patterns:
    if re.search(p, cmd, re.IGNORECASE):
        print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'BLOQUE: operation destructive BDD detectee. Demandez confirmation explicite avant de DROP/DELETE/supprimer data.db.'}))
        sys.exit(0)
"
